form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 9 len Plumpton on February 23 over 4000m on rain affected going defeating Koenigsstern with 66kg at $4.50 in a steeplechase. Last start favourite; won by 1.75 len Plumpton on March 9 over 4000m defeating Lunar Ocean with 76kg at $1.70 in a steeplechase. Can make it three straight.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Not raced for 44 days. Fresh up after three months finished seventh of 9 starters at Plumpton on February 23 over 5000m, slow track; 52 len behind Junior Des Mottes carrying 66kg at $51. Previously second-up finished fifth of 8 starters at Lingfield on December 13 over 3900m, 41 len behind Getaway With You carrying 67.5kg at $34. First up effort suggests unlikely to be winning.
